```mjs title=async.mjs
import * as _rspack_external_fs from "fs";
import * as ns from "fs";

// fs?3cf4

// ./async.js


// access namespace
console.log.bind(ns)


export { ns };

```

```mjs title=main.mjs
import fs, { readFile } from "fs";

const f1 = fs;
const f1_0 = fs;
// fs?771d

// fs?5ccf

// ./other.js

/* export default */ const other = (f1);


// fs?22cf

// ./other2.js


// ./index.js




it('should render external correctly', async () => {
  const {ns} = await import("./async.mjs")

  expect(f1).toBe(other).toBe(fs).toBe(ns.default)
  expect(readFile).toBe(readFile).toBe(readFile).toBe(ns.readFile)
})
export {};

```
